Use Cases

Vienna OS governs AI agents across every industry where autonomous actions need oversight, compliance, and accountability.

Financial Services

SOX, FINRA, PCI-DSS Compliance

AI agents handling trades, wire transfers, and portfolio management need governance that satisfies regulators. Vienna OS provides cryptographic proof that every financial action was authorized within approved parameters.

✓T2 multi-party approval for transactions over configurable thresholds
✓Immutable audit trail satisfying SOX Section 404 requirements
✓Warrant-scoped execution preventing unauthorized trading
✓Real-time risk tier assessment for every financial operation

Example Warrant Flow

Wire transfer $75,000 → T2 warrant → 2 human approvers → HMAC-SHA256 signed → executed → audit logged

Read more

Healthcare & Life Sciences

HIPAA, FDA 21 CFR Part 11

AI agents accessing patient records, updating treatment plans, or processing claims must comply with HIPAA. Vienna OS enforces minimum necessary access and maintains the audit trails required for compliance.

✓PHI-scoped warrants limiting access to specific patient records
✓7-year audit retention meeting HIPAA requirements
✓Role-based approval chains for sensitive data operations
✓Automatic risk escalation for bulk data access patterns

Example Warrant Flow

Access patient record #4821 → T1 warrant → policy: treating_physician_only → scoped to demographics + vitals → 300s TTL

Read more

DevOps & Platform Engineering

SOC 2, Change Management

AI agents deploying code, scaling infrastructure, and managing configurations can cause catastrophic damage without proper controls. Vienna OS prevents runaway deployments and unauthorized changes.

✓T1 auto-approval for staging deploys, T2 human approval for production
✓Blast radius limits preventing cluster over-scaling
✓Rollback plan requirements for T3 infrastructure changes
✓Integration with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI)

Example Warrant Flow

Deploy v2.4.1 to production → T2 warrant → SRE approval → max 5 instances → rollback: v2.4.0 → 600s TTL

Read more

Enterprise AI Platforms

ISO 27001, EU AI Act

Organizations deploying multiple AI agents across departments need centralized governance. Vienna OS provides a single control plane for fleet management, policy enforcement, and compliance reporting.

✓Centralized fleet dashboard for 100s of agents
✓Department-scoped policies with inheritance
✓EU AI Act risk classification mapping
✓Automated compliance report generation

Example Warrant Flow

Marketing agent → email 50K users → T3 warrant → VP Marketing + Legal approval → content review → rate limit 1K/hr

Read more

Supply Chain & Logistics

Operational Safety

AI agents optimizing routes, managing inventory, and coordinating shipments operate in high-stakes environments where errors have physical consequences. Vienna OS ensures human oversight for critical decisions.

✓T2 approval for route changes affecting delivery SLAs
✓Inventory threshold alerts before agent-initiated reorders
✓Supplier payment authorization with amount caps
✓Integration with ERP systems (SAP, Oracle)

Example Warrant Flow

Reorder 10K units from Supplier A → T1 warrant → policy: approved_suppliers + budget_under_50K → auto-approved → PO generated

Security Operations

Incident Response, Threat Hunting

AI agents in SOC environments can quarantine hosts, block IPs, and escalate incidents. Without governance, an overzealous agent could take down production systems during a false positive.

✓T0 auto-approval for read-only threat intelligence queries
✓T1 policy approval for automated quarantine actions
✓T2 human approval for network-wide blocking rules
✓Tamper-proof audit trail for incident forensics

Example Warrant Flow

Block IP 203.0.113.42 → T1 warrant → policy: known_malicious_source → auto-approved → firewall rule added → 3600s TTL
